	inc @R0
	dec 01h
	nop

	ajmp jump_1802

	nop
	ljmp jump_0901

	mov A, #00h	;   0
	ajmp jump_1801

	nop
	orl C, /26h.2
	inc R1

	inc R6

	nop

	ljmp jump_3FFF

	inc @R1

	ajmp jump_1807

	inc 82h
	ljmp jump_3FFF

	ajmp jump_1807

	inc 83h

	ajmp jump_1807

	ljmp jump_3FFF

	ljmp jump_3FFF

	ajmp jump_1807

	inc 86h
	ljmp jump_3FFF

	ajmp jump_1807

	inc 87h
	ljmp jump_3FFF

	ajmp jump_1800

	nop
	nop
	nop
	dec R1
	mov 00h, @R0
	jc jump_1D3B
	rr A
	inc R1
	inc A
	orl A, R0
jump_1D3B:
	rr A
	orl A, R3
	nop
	xrl A, 00h
	mov R1, #00h	;   0
	jmp @A + DPTR

	nop
	jnz fwd_1D46_jump_1B00
fwd_1D46_jump_1B00:
	ajmp jump_1B00

	xrl A, R6
	nop
	add A, R4
	nop
	jb 20h.0, jump_1DB0
	nop
	jb 20h.0, jump_1DB7
	nop
	xrl A, R1
	nop
	mov @R0, #00h	;   0
	xrl A, R1
	nop
	jmp @A + DPTR

	nop
	xrl A, R1
	nop
	xrl A, R7
	nop
	xrl A, R6
	nop
	jb 20h.0, jump_1DD4
	nop
	xrl A, @R0
	nop
	jb 20h.0, jump_1DB4
	nop
	xrl A, R6
	nop
	xrl A, R6
	nop
	xrl A, R7
	nop
	anl 00h, #79h	; 121 'y'
	nop
	nop
	nop
	nop
	nop
	dec R1
	xch A, @R0
	nop
	jc jump_1DF2
	nop
	jb 20h.0, jump_1DCC
	nop
	xrl A, R6
	nop
	xrl 00h, #2Eh	;  46 '.'
	nop
	addc A, @R0
	rr A
	orl A, R3
	nop
	xrl A, 00h
	mov R1, #00h	;   0
	jmp @A + DPTR

	nop
	jnz fwd_1D96_jump_1B00
fwd_1D96_jump_1B00:
	ajmp jump_1B00

	xrl A, R6
	nop
	jb 20h.0, jump_1DF2
	nop
	anl 00h, #42h	;  66 'B'
	nop
	jb 20h.0, jump_1DF8
	nop
	xrl A, 00h
	orl C, 20h.0
	xrl A, R1
	nop
	ajmp jump_1B00

	xrl A, R4
	nop
jump_1DB0:
	jb 20h.0, jump_1DF4
	nop
jump_1DB4:
	xrl A, #00h	;   0
	ajmp jump_1B00

; overlapping 1 byte(s)

org	1DB7h
jump_1DB7:
	nop

org	1DB8h
	jnz jump_1DBA
jump_1DBA:
	mov A, #00h	;   0
	xrl A, 00h
	nop
	nop
	nop
	nop
	dec R2
	inc @R0
	nop
	inc A
	orl C, 20h.0
	nop
	nop
	nop
	nop
jump_1DCC:

	nop
	nop
	nop
	nop
	nop

end
